song.title: Satisfied
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) All my life I had a longing For a drink from some clear spring, That I hoped would quench the burning Of the thirst I felt within.
[C] Chorus Hallelujah! I have found Him Whom my soul so long has craved! Jesus satisfies my longings; Through His blood I now am saved.
[V2] 2) Feeding on the husks around me, Till my strength was almost gone, Longed my soul for something better, Only still to hunger on.
[V3] 3) Poor I was, and sought for riches, Something that would satisfy, But the dust I gathered round me Only mocked my soul’s sad cry.
[V4] 4) Well of water, ever springing, Bread of life, so rich and free, Untold wealth that never faileth, My Redeemer is to me.
song.author: Clara Tear Williams
